subject: Thanks again.
body:
Hi Jeffrey,

I wanted to thank you again for helping with me and Tiago's flight for Thanksgiving....you're very generous and I am extremely grateful for all your help. Thanks again!

Also, my parents send their best regards to you and thank you for all your help.

You're such a kind, caring man and I'm crossing my fingers things work out in your favor.

Best,

Dana

P.S. Please let me know if there's anything I can do to help :)

________________________________________________________________________
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail! - http://mail.aol.com
